history_cutoff_rule: history strictly before target draw; cutoff = previous draw id
outcome_leakage_guard: target outcome never passed to adapter; adapter rejects target-in-history and forbidden metadata keys

random_baseline_config.diversified_method: seeded shuffle-and-chunk of 1..49 into disjoint sixes
random_baseline_config.generation: uniform 6-of-49 without replacement per ticket; deterministic per (seed,target,replicate)

combination_definitions.all_11_adapter_unique: All eleven remediated (candidate-selected) tickets at bet_index=1.
combination_definitions.top_k_by_historical_training_only: Top-k strategies ranked by walk-forward expanding-window prize-aware win rate over draws strictly before each evaluation target (research observation layer; not adapter/registry selection).
combination_definitions.diversity_greedy_overlap_minimized: Greedy selection of k tickets minimizing pairwise number overlap; seeded by canonical-order strategy 0; no training, no outcome use.
combination_definitions.per_family_cap_derived_heuristic: Tickets capped at 1 per DERIVED keyword family (family metadata not authoritative); canonical order; variable budget.
combination_definitions.equal_budget_random: k uniform 6-of-49 tickets per draw (seeded replicate distribution).
combination_definitions.diversified_random: k low-overlap random tickets greedily chosen from a seeded random pool.

multiple_testing_warning: Many combinations x k x horizons were compared. Monte-Carlo p-values are uncorrected; apply Bonferroni/BH before any inferential claim. Treat all results as observation-only research.
limitations: Retrospective replay against historical outcomes is not prospective/future-only validation.
Multiple combinations x k x horizons were compared; p-values are uncorrected (multiple-testing risk).
top_k_by_historical_training_only uses expanding-window training but remains susceptible to limited training tails.
Random baselines estimate expected portfolio behaviour via 200 seeded replicates, not exhaustively.
BIG 6/49 first-zone signal has prior NULL findings (L82/L90/L91); replay edges may be statistical noise.
Adapter candidate selection is deterministic canonical-order, not outcome-aware; this is preserved unchanged.
next_recommended_research_step: If any observation-only candidate beats both the equal-budget random baseline and all_11_adapter_unique with stability across horizons, request separate Owner authorization for an independent leakage/multiple-testing audit before any future-only/OOS evaluation. No publication or activation is implied.
no_publication_statement: No real publication, pre-draw manifest, or publication PR was created.
no_official_target_or_deadline_statement: No official target draw or deadline was looked up. No network access.
